title: The Groundnut Aflatoxin Problem Review and Literature Database
abstract: Contains reviews of important aspects of the groundnut aflatoxin problem together with annotated bibliographies. Aspects covered include aflatoxicosis in animals and humans, research on aflatoxin contamination of groundnuts, aflatoxins in groundnut and groundnut products, limits and regulations on aflatoxins, methods for aflatoxin analysis, and management of aflatoxin contamination.
